title: BinTelemetry
description: Flat telemetry payload published by an ESP32 smart bin (or its simulator) on sensors/bin/<bin_id>/telemetry. This is the F1↔F2 contract — must match service-specifications.md §SERVICE 1.

bin_id.description: Stable device identifier. Convention: BIN-<3-digit zero-padded number>.

fill_level_pct.description: Bin fill level as a percentage of total volume, derived from the ToF distance reading.

battery_level_pct.description: Remaining battery charge as a percentage.

signal_strength_dbm.description: MQTT/Wi-Fi signal strength in dBm. Typical range -100 (poor) to -30 (excellent).

temperature_c.description: Ambient temperature inside/around the bin enclosure in degrees Celsius.

timestamp.description: Reading time in ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 UTC format with trailing Z (e.g. 2026-04-15T09:14:22Z).

firmware_version.description: Semantic version of the firmware currently running on the device.

error_flags.description: Bitmask of active error conditions. 0 = healthy. bit0 = sensor read error, bit1 = lid open, bit2 = tilt, bit3 = ToF sunlight dropout. Reserved bits must be 0.
